name: agent-harness-routing
purpose: Regression cases for Feibo Deck capability routing. Each case declares the rule it enforces via enforced_by anchors; the eval engine checks that those anchors survive in the compiled prompt.

cases.user: Explain a Python for loop in one paragraph.
enforced_by: Stable or timeless facts usually do not require search
cases.notes: Stable basic programming knowledge should not trigger retrieval.

cases.user: Who is the current CEO of Disney?
Summarize the design doc in this repo.
enforced_by: A prompt implying a file exists is not proof that it exists

cases.user: Write this as a reusable Markdown guide.
enforced_by: Create durable files when the user asks for durable output
cases.notes: Reusable durable output should be a file.

enforced_by: Run commands or tests when implementing, debugging, validating code
cases.notes: Code completion must be verified by running the relevant check.

enforced_by: Ask at most one clarifying question when ambiguity blocks safe progress
cases.notes: Do not ask a broad clarifying question when local docs can reveal a reasonable target.
